In his giant second form a saucer counts down from 4 to a one-shot kill — reset it by deflecting his spiked ball into it (Baby Luigi sends it straight up; Baby Mario angles it right). Winning grants the fifth Cobalt Star shard.
Jump through the time hole to the Castle Sewers — Chapter 9.

chapters.title: Chapter 9 — Shroob Castle & the Finale
chapters.intro: The endgame: cross the Shroob Castle (Peach's Castle in the past), down its Mother Ship in a saucer dogfight, and clear the final-boss gauntlet — Princess Shroob and her elder sister — before the possessed Bowser (Shrowser) falls and the game is won.

items.text: Walk to the upper-left corner of the sewers back into Peach's Castle, then the items shop. Buy Red Shells, 20 Ice Flowers, and Green Shells; in equipment grab one Royal Pants and two Royal Trousers, plus two Cure Badge As. Talk to the Professor — the time hole to Shroob Castle is on the third floor. Take the left stairs up two floors, save in the middle-right room, and drop through the marked time hole.

Tashrooba (125 HP, 150 XP): a faster gray Tanoomba — hammer-counter its balloon/Thwomp drops and jump together for its shell. The castle also crawls with Ghoul Guys, Shroobsworths, Snoozorbs, and (in the bottomless garden/Soul Bubble rooms) instant-death pits — never fall.

Wind through the castle's cliff-tops and small caves, digging each BEAN (behind the cliff-top fences, in the secret garden cave with two beans, and around the laser rooms), and grabbing the Space Trousers, Supreme Slacks, peppers, and stacks of Bro Items. Beat the four-Chain-Chomp puzzle (find the real, faster-chomping one and laser it), then route the Big Bros and Babies through the Split-Block laser puzzles to open the blue pipes between floors.

On the uppermost floor, hit the bookshelf '!' block to lower a bookcase and Spin the Babies up for Red/Green Peppers, gather the six-block stash (Mix Flowers, Trampolines, Pocket Chomps, Red Shells, Copy Flowers, Ice Flowers), and stock the long staircase rooms with Mushrooms of every kind. Hit the Heart Block (the only one outside Peach's Castle), save, and ride the blue button toward the saucer battle.

You pilot a saucer against Princess Shroob's Mother Ship: hit the saucer block in the back to rise, wait for the small saucers to briefly stop, and shoot them into the mother ship (four hits). You have four points of health — getting hit four times kills you. The small saucers fly at you after ~10 seconds; dodge or shoot them. Save afterward.

Princess Shroob 3000 HP / Force Field ~1000 · Hard. Power up with Red Peppers and shred the force field with Trampolines/Pocket Chomps/Copy Flowers (it shifts blue→green→orange→red as it weakens). Jump her downward energy rings (watch the robot-leg shadow) and hammer back her force-field smash. When it breaks, unload ~500 damage per turn — for A Princess Without Her Guard, finish her before she raises a new shield. Out of the field, dodge/deflect her laser balls.

figure.caption: Princess Shroob — break the shield and finish her before it returns

items.text: First Form 3000 HP, Second Form 3000 HP (Foot 500 / Crown 350 / Arms 250) · Very Hard. First form: Red Peppers, then Copy Flowers/Pocket Chomps/Red Shells; hammer the yellow stars into her assisting saucers; counter her charge (hammer just before contact, or after a one-second delay if her hand waves up). Second form: use Mix Flowers on her tentacles and foot, then Copy Flowers/Pocket Chomps to break her crown and damage her body; deflect the falling saucers (fire→Mario, short-circuit→Luigi). For Pantless Victory, fight her with NO pants and NO badges on anyone.

figure.caption: Elder Princess Shroob — the hardest fight; save your Mix Flowers

items.text: After a long cut scene you return to present-day Peach's Castle, the future saved.
Save in the garden room, heal up, and walk to the back of the castle. After Bowser eats the Mushroom, the final fight begins — Bowser possessed by Princess Shroob's ghost (Shrowser).

Bowser with Princess Shroob's ghost · 10 pieces (the ghost's health) · Moderately Easy. You can't attack directly — counter/dodge so his attacks hit the ghost. Jump his direct fireballs (they loop back, half a piece each); hammer the ceiling fireballs and his slow energy balls back at her (a full piece each). They speed up as the fight goes on — clear all 10 pieces (taking zero hits for Shroob Exterminator) to win the game. Congratulations — you've beaten Mario & Luigi: Partners in Time!

chapters.title: Roundup — Bro-Item Masters
chapters.intro: Ten challenge achievements for landing a set number of hits with each Bro Item in a single attack. Best farmed against a single tough enemy or boss so every hit lands on one target. Keep a stock of each item (most are common in late-game blocks; Red/Copy/Mix Flowers show up from Toad Town onward).

chapters.title: Roundup — 100% Completion
chapters.intro: The two game-spanning completion achievements. Both are missable: dig every bean as you go (the route flags each 'BEAN' inline and each region has its own Harvest Bean achievement), and never sell the item-block-only pants.
